items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding credit rollover or expiration.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement that credits either rollover or expire, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete checks or confirmations regarding this aspect. The linked use case mentions that credits expire at month-end with no rollover, but there is no direct evidence from API reads or persisted state checks to confirm this behavior. Therefore, the validation step is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
